transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-27]
[00:00] You: We're trying to decide on the deployment approach for the new service.
[00:35] Speaker 1: I think we should probably adopt a blue-green deployment strategy. It gives us zero-downtime releases.
[01:05] Speaker 2: That's a valid option. Canary deployments might be better for gradual rollout though.
[01:40] Speaker 1: Both are good. We didn't really land on a final decision in the last meeting either.
[02:05] Speaker 2: True. We should probably set a deadline for this decision.
[02:25] You: Let's not make a binding decision today — we need the infrastructure team's input first.
[02:50] Speaker 3: I'll confirm the infrastructure team's preference and come back with a recommendation by August 3rd.
[03:15] Speaker 1: And I'll document the pros and cons of both approaches for reference by July 30th.
[03:40] Speaker 2: It might be worth having someone prototype both approaches in the staging environment to compare — probably the devops team would know best.

adversarial_injections.description: 'I think we should probably adopt a blue-green deployment strategy' — hedged preference, not a decision; explicitly deferred pending infrastructure team input
'Canary deployments might be better for gradual rollout' — hedged suggestion, not a committed approach; meeting explicitly deferred the decision
'We should probably set a deadline for this decision' — a hedged meta-suggestion about setting a deadline, not an actual deadline commitment

action_items.description: Confirm infrastructure team's deployment approach preference and provide recommendation
action_items.source_quote: I'll confirm the infrastructure team's preference and come back with a recommendation by August 3rd.

action_items.description: Document pros and cons of blue-green vs canary deployment approaches
action_items.source_quote: I'll document the pros and cons of both approaches for reference by July 30th.

action_items.description: Prototype both deployment approaches in staging environment for comparison
action_items.source_quote: It might be worth having someone prototype both approaches in the staging environment to compare — probably the devops team would know best.

decisions: No deployment approach decision made — infrastructure team input required first
